mapper.sql: task_id, incident_id, source_event_id, source_system, event_stage, origin_source_system, target_system, task_type, task_type_code, status, priority, tenant_id, site_id, plant_id, object_type, object_id, event_type, error_code, requested_skill, handoff_mode, correlation_id, parent_task_id, matched_flow_id, matched_rule_id, assigned_pool_id, target_pool_id, classification_status, classification_result_json, routing_path, routing_policy, required_capabilities_json, created_reason, occurrence_count_at_creation, created_at, updated_at, timeout_at, terminal_at, reassignment_count, next_dispatch_attempt_at, dispatch_attempt_count, dispatch_retry_reason, dispatch_recovery_claimed_by, dispatch_recovery_claim_until, lifecycle_reason, external_execution_key
mapper.insert: insert into tasks () values ( #{task.taskId}, #{task.incidentId}, #{task.sourceEventId}, #{task.sourceSystem}, #{task.eventStage}, #{task.originSourceSystem}, #{task.targetSystem}, #{task.taskType}, #{task.taskTypeCode}, #{task.status}, #{task.priority}, #{task.tenantId}, #{task.siteId}, #{task.plantId}, #{task.objectType}, #{task.objectId}, #{task.eventType}, #{task.errorCode}, #{task.requestedSkill}, #{task.handoffMode}, #{task.correlationId}, #{task.parentTaskId}, #{task.matchedFlowId}, #{task.matchedRuleId}, #{task.assignedPoolId}, #{task.targetPoolId}, #{task.classificationStatus}, coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{task.classificationResultJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{task.routingPath}, #{task.routingPolicy}, coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{task.requiredCapabilitiesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), #{task.createdReason}, #{task.occurrenceCountAtCreation}, #{task.createdAt}, #{task.updatedAt}, #{task.timeoutAt}, #{task.terminalAt}, #{task.reassignmentCount}, #{task.nextDispatchAttemptAt}, #{task.dispatchAttemptCount}, #{task.dispatchRetryReason}, #{task.dispatchRecoveryClaimedBy}, #{task.dispatchRecoveryClaimUntil}, #{task.lifecycleReason}, #{task.externalExecutionKey} ) on conflict (task_id) do update set incident_id = excluded.incident_id, source_event_id = excluded.source_event_id, source_system = excluded.source_system, event_stage = excluded.event_stage, origin_source_system = excluded.origin_source_system, target_system = excluded.target_system, task_type = excluded.task_type, task_type_code = excluded.task_type_code, status = excluded.status, priority = excluded.priority, tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, site_id = excluded.site_id, plant_id = excluded.plant_id, object_type = excluded.object_type, object_id = excluded.object_id, event_type = excluded.event_type, error_code = excluded.error_code, requested_skill = excluded.requested_skill, handoff_mode = excluded.handoff_mode, correlation_id = excluded.correlation_id, parent_task_id = excluded.parent_task_id, matched_flow_id = excluded.matched_flow_id, matched_rule_id = excluded.matched_rule_id, assigned_pool_id = excluded.assigned_pool_id, target_pool_id = excluded.target_pool_id, classification_status = excluded.classification_status, classification_result_json = excluded.classification_result_json, routing_path = excluded.routing_path, routing_policy = excluded.routing_policy, required_capabilities_json = excluded.required_capabilities_json, created_reason = excluded.created_reason, occurrence_count_at_creation = excluded.occurrence_count_at_creation, timeout_at = excluded.timeout_at, terminal_at = excluded.terminal_at, reassignment_count = excluded.reassignment_count, next_dispatch_attempt_at = excluded.next_dispatch_attempt_at, dispatch_attempt_count = excluded.dispatch_attempt_count, dispatch_retry_reason = excluded.dispatch_retry_reason, dispatch_recovery_claimed_by = excluded.dispatch_recovery_claimed_by, dispatch_recovery_claim_until = excluded.dispatch_recovery_claim_until, lifecycle_reason = excluded.lifecycle_reason, external_execution_key = excluded.external_execution_key, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select * from tasks where incident_id = #{incidentId} and task_type = #{taskType} and status not in ('SUCCEEDED','FAILED','ESCALATED','DEAD_LETTER','SUPPRESSED','COMPLETED','TIMED_OUT','CANCELLED') order by created_at desc limit 1
select * from tasks where incident_id = #{incidentId} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}

with candidates as ( select t.task_id, case when t.next_dispatch_attempt_at is not null then t.next_dispatch_attempt_at else t.updated_at end as recovery_sort_at from tasks t where t.status in ('QUEUED','CREATED','RETRY_WAIT') and (t.dispatch_recovery_claim_until is null or t.dispatch_recovery_claim_until <= #{now}) and not exists ( select 1 from task_assignments a where a.task_id = t.task_id and upper(coalesce(a.status, '')) in ('ASSIGNED','DISPATCHED','RUNNING') ) and t.next_dispatch_attempt_at is not null and t.next_dispatch_attempt_at <= #{now} order by recovery_sort_at asc nulls first, t.updated_at asc limit #{limit} for update skip locked ) update tasks t set dispatch_recovery_claimed_by = #{workerId}, dispatch_recovery_claim_until = #{claimUntil}, updated_at = #{now}, lifecycle_reason = t.lifecycle_reason from candidates where t.task_id = candidates.task_id returning t.*
mapper.update: update tasks set status = 'RETRY_WAIT', next_dispatch_attempt_at = null, dispatch_retry_reason = concat('WAITING_CONFIGURATION:', #{blockerCode}, ':', coalesce(#{reason}, '')), dispatch_recovery_claimed_by = null, dispatch_recovery_claim_until = null, updated_at = #{now}, lifecycle_reason = concat('Waiting for dispatch configuration change: ', #{blockerCode}) where task_id = #{taskId}

update tasks set status = 'QUEUED', next_dispatch_attempt_at = #{now}, dispatch_retry_reason = #{reason}, dispatch_recovery_claimed_by = null, dispatch_recovery_claim_until = null, updated_at = #{now}, lifecycle_reason = #{reason} where upper(tenant_id) = upper(#{tenantId})
and upper(source_system) = upper(#{sourceSystem})
and dispatch_retry_reason like 'WAITING_CONFIGURATION:%' and status in ('QUEUED','CREATED','RETRY_WAIT')
